articles.title_en: Participants of the Russia-ASEAN Business Forum will discuss cooperation in the field of AI and trade
articles.lead_en: Representatives of the delegations of the association's participants will be presented with an exhibition of enterprises of the Republic of Tatarstan, and a visit to the special economic zone "Innopolis" will be organized.

articles.title_en: Reuters: The EU intends to include 90 Russian banks in the 21st package of sanctions
articles.lead_en: This will bring the number of Russian banks under sanctions to half of all Russian financial organizations carrying out international transactions, the agency claims

articles.title_en: Medvedev: the budget of the people's program of "United Russia" has been increased by 174 billion rubles

articles.title_en: Medvedev: the stability of the Russian economy in conditions of hostilities cannot be denied
articles.lead_en: The Chairman of United Russia emphasized that over the past three years, Russia's GDP has increased by more than 10%, and the manufacturing industry has become the main source of growth
articles.title_raw: Медведев: устойчивость экономики РФ в условиях боевых действий нельзя отрицать
articles.lead_raw: Председатель "Единой России" подчеркнул, что за последние три года ВВП России увеличился более чем на 10%, а основным источником роста стала обрабатывающая промышленность

articles.title_en: High oil prices and tax hikes aren’t enough to offset war spending and keep Russia’s budget on track

articles.title_en: In 2026, the Russian Federation intends to maintain electricity exports and imports at the 2025 level
articles.lead_en: The company's annual report noted that the volume of Inter RAO trading export-import operations across the Russian border in 2025 decreased by 6.9% compared to the previous year - to 9.7 billion kWh.
articles.title_raw: РФ в 2026 году намерена сохранить экспорт и импорт электроэнергии на уровне 2025 года
articles.lead_raw: В годовом отчете компании отмечалось, что объем трейдинговых экспортно-импортных операций "Интер РАО" через границу России в 2025 году сократился на 6,9% по сравнению с предыдущим годом - до 9,7 млрд кВт⋅ч.

articles.title_en: Russia and Brazil are discussing new contracts in agrochemicals
articles.lead_en: President of the Brazilian-Russian Chamber of Commerce, Industry and Tourism Gilberto Ramos said that the Russian Federation already has a significant presence in Brazil in terms of exports of phosphates, potassium chloride and urea

articles.title_en: Zhukov: the world will no longer be the same as before the SVO and sanctions
articles.lead_en: The First Deputy Speaker of the State Duma noted that the economic ties of the Russian Federation with Europe and the United States have significantly decreased, and the growth rates of the economies of the BRICS countries today exceed those of the G7 countries.
